description_long: This is a rustic wooden bench with a backrest, constructed from weathered wooden planks and reinforced by dark metal brackets. The seat consists of three wide, evenly spaced wooden slats, while the backrest is made up of three horizontal planks, all showing a distressed, aged texture. The bench is supported by two sturdy wooden legs on each side, with additional metal supports running vertically and horizontally for stability. The wood appears rough and untreated, giving it a natural, outdoor look suitable for parks or urban green spaces. There are no armrests, and the bench is designed to comfortably seat two to three people. The overall construction suggests durability and resistance to outdoor elements.
description: A weathered wooden bench with a slatted seat and backrest, reinforced by dark metal brackets. It has a rustic, outdoor appearance and no armrests.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden planks and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three wide seat slats and three horizontal backrest planks, with visible metal brackets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the structure and materials seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full length of the backrest planks and the vertical metal supports.
attribute_leg_design: two wide wooden legs with metal reinforcement
